definition: Market breadth deterioration (Stage 1 of cycle unwinding) is active and confirmed, with equal-weighted S&P 500 underperforming cap-weighted by 800-1200bp. Confirmed across 7+ historical episodes where breadth deterioration preceded broader stress.
evidence: Equal-weighted S&P 500 underperformance of 800-1200bp is directly observable
Stage 2 (revenue validation failure) has not yet triggered
open_questions: When or whether Stage 2 (revenue validation failure) triggers
Whether any major hyperscaler reports a quarter with materially disappointing AI revenue growth
How long Stage 1 can persist without progression
